title: Notes London A6 Notebook with Lined Pages, Pen Loop and Expandable Paper Pocket Hardback Medium Journal New Notepad Note Book Notes Diary Pad (Black)
features: Book Features - Medium A6 Notebook (9 x 14.2cm) with a luxury soft feel vegan leather hard cover notebook. This journal has traditional 70gsm ivory lined pages ( 160 pages / 80 sheets ). This notepad comes with a handy pen loop holder, elastic closure, ribbon page marker and expandable paper pocket in the back

Notebook Colours Available - Black, Grey, White, Red, Orange, Yellow, Orange, Pink, Purple, Cyan, Blue, Lime, Grey, Green, Neon Yellow, Neon Orange, Neon Green, Neon Pink, Pastel Pink, Pastel Purple, Pastel Mushroom, Pastel Mint, Pastel Blue, Pastel Aqua Marine, Pastel Teal, Pastel Celeste and Pastel Tan

Designed in the UK our notebooks are a great multipurpose pad which can be used for office work / work / business / university / college / school / education / notes / note taking / diary / shopping list / recipe book / exercise / gym / fitness / workout / personal training / accounts / nurse notes / astrology & manifesting notes etc. Our notebooks are perfect for personal use or an amazing gift for a loved one
